overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex at night. The character holds a torch to illuminate hieroglyphic-covered walls and massive columns, transitioning from indoor halls to outdoor courtyards and palm-lined avenues.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple hall with painted columns and hieroglyphic reliefs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the torchlit temple hall, holding a flame to illuminate the carved columns

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near a column, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: massive stone pillars with colorful painted capitals and hieroglyphic carvings
detailed Egyptian carvings and paintings covering the stone walls
tall bronze stands holding burning flames providing warm light
wide ascending steps leading to an upper level of the temple

segments.scene_description: The character explores a grand interior hall of an Egyptian temple, illuminated by torchlight and braziers. Massive decorated columns rise on either side, covered in colorful hieroglyphic reliefs. A few NPCs stand near the columns in the distance as the character approaches a wide stone staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending corridor with hieroglyphic walls

events.description: exits the grand hall into a narrow enclosed corridor with steep stairs
night sky becomes visible at the end of the corridor as the character approaches the exit

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through a narrow passage, torchlight flickering on detailed wall carvings

entered.detail: tight stone walls covered in dense hieroglyphic inscriptions creating a confined passage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow staircase corridor, the walls covered in dense hieroglyphic carvings. The space is tight and enclosed, with the torch casting dramatic shadows. As the character climbs, the night sky becomes visible at the corridor's end, indicating an exit to the outdoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with potted palm trees

events.description: exits the enclosed corridor into an open-air courtyard with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through an open courtyard, passing large potted palm trees and stone planters

entered.detail: large palm trees in ornate black and gold decorative planters
rectangular raised beds with flowers and greenery
ancient stone structures with hieroglyphic facades surrounding the courtyard
dark blue starry sky visible overhead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character enters a spacious outdoor courtyard under a dark blue night sky. Large potted palm trees in ornate planters line the path, and flower beds add color to the stone surroundings. The torchlight contrasts with the cool night air as the character explores the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple complex street with construction scaffolding

events.description: slight turn to the right while navigating around construction materials

agents.ego_description: navigating through streets lined with wooden scaffolding and construction debris, approaching a large gate

entered.detail: wooden construction frameworks against stone buildings indicating renovation work
monumental stone entrance with large statues flanking the doorway
large seated pharaoh statues guarding the temple entrance
wooden crates, barrels, and building supplies stacked along the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a street area of the temple complex where construction scaffolding and materials indicate ongoing work. The path leads toward an impressive monumental gate guarded by large stone statues. The torch illuminates the stone pavement and wooden structures as the character approaches the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined avenue beyond the temple gate

events.description: passes through the large temple gate into the avenue beyond
encounters a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking down a palm-lined avenue after passing through the gate, passing a local pedestrian

notable_agents.action: civilian walking toward the camera along the avenue

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the wide avenue creating a corridor
tall stone monuments visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Passing through the monumental gate, the character enters a wide avenue lined with tall palm trees on both sides. The space opens up significantly, with distant obelisks visible against the night sky. A pedestrian walks toward the character from the opposite direction, the only other person visible in this section of the temple complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the torchlit depths of a grand temple interior into the expansive, open-air avenues of an ancient Egyptian complex at night. It begins in a massive hall where decorated columns and colorful hieroglyphics are illuminated by braziers, moving forward toward a wide stone staircase. As the character ascends a narrow, enclosed corridor of dense carvings, the oppressive shadows give way to the dark blue night sky visible at the exit. The scene then opens into a spacious outdoor courtyard filled with potted palms and flower beds before shifting toward a construction area marked by scaffolding and a monumental gate guarded by stone statues. Finally, the camera passes through the gate to reveal a wide, palm-lined avenue that stretches toward distant obelisks under the starlit sky.
